hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git\s+push'; then superx-state check-quality-gates; fi; "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-/Users/rj/Downloads/superx}/bin/parallelism-tracker" check Bash 2>&1 || true

INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-/Users/rj/Downloads/superx}/bin/parallelism-tracker" check "$TOOL" 2>&1 || true

INPUT=$(cat); CONTENT=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // empty' 2>/dev/null); TOOL=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-/Users/rj/Downloads/superx}/bin/parallelism-tracker" check "$TOOL" 2>&1 || true; if [ -z "$CONTENT" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE '(//\s*TODO|#\s*TODO|FIXME|XXX|NotImplementedError|unimplemented!\(\)|todo!\(\)|placeholder|\bstub\b|\bshim\b)'; then echo '{"error": "BLOCKED: stub/placeholder code detected. Write real implementation or explain why you cannot."}'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'throw new Error\(["'"'"'"]not implemented["'"'"'"]\)'; then echo '{"error": "BLOCKED: stub/placeholder code detected. Write real implementation or explain why you cannot."}'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '^\s*pass\s*$'; then echo '{"error": "BLOCKED: stub/placeholder code detected. Write real implementation or explain why you cannot."}'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '\(\)\s*=>\s*\{\s*\}|function\s*\(\)\s*\{\s*\}'; then echo '{"error": "BLOCKED: stub/placeholder code detected. Write real implementation or explain why you cannot."}'; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"'); FPATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FPATH" ]; then "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-/Users/rj/Downloads/superx}/bin/edit-tracker" log "$TOOL" "$FPATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if [ -f superx-state.json ]; then superx-state mark-dirty 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if [ -f .superx-no-autocommit ]; then exit 0; fi; count=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$count" -ge 5 ] && [ -d .git ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "superx: auto-checkpoint (${count} files)" --no-verify 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PLUGIN="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-/Users/rj/Downloads/superx}"; TRACKER="$PLUGIN/bin/parallelism-tracker"; if [ -f "$PLUGIN/bin/parallelism-tracker.c" ] && { [ ! -x "$TRACKER" ] || ! "$TRACKER" check probe >/dev/null 2>&1; }; then "$PLUGIN/bin/build-tracker.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; ETRACKER="$PLUGIN/bin/edit-tracker"; if [ -f "$PLUGIN/bin/edit-tracker.c" ] && [ ! -x "$ETRACKER" ]; then clang -O2 -Wall -Wextra -o "$ETRACKER" "$PLUGIN/bin/edit-tracker.c" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; "$ETRACKER" clear 2>/dev/null || true; if [ ! -f superx-state.json ]; then superx-state init 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if [ -f .planning/CHECKPOINT.md ]; then echo "[superx] Checkpoint found — read .planning/CHECKPOINT.md to resume."; elif [ -f .planning/STATE.md ]; then echo "[superx] State found — read .planning/STATE.md for prior context."; fi

"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-/Users/rj/Downloads/superx}/bin/parallelism-tracker" grade 2>&1 || true; "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-/Users/rj/Downloads/superx}/bin/verify-edits" --quick 2>&1 || true; if [ -f .superx-no-autocommit ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -d .git ] && [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then count=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); git add -A && git commit -m "superx: session-end checkpoint (${count} files)" --no-verify 2>/dev/null || true; fi
